hero.lead: KREA is a creative technology studio designing brands, products and digital worlds at the intersection of art, code and intelligence.

brand.title: Brand Identity
brand.desc: Strategy, naming, visual systems and verbal identity that hold under any pressure — from a billboard to a single pixel.

product.title: Product Design
product.desc: Interfaces with their own architecture and rhythm. From the first sketch to the last component in production.

motion.title: Motion Design
motion.desc: Cinematic, physics-driven motion that turns interfaces into instruments and brands into living things.

ai.title: AI Experiences
ai.desc: Generative tools, agentic flows, intelligent surfaces. We design systems that think — and stay beautiful while doing it.

web.title: Web Engineering
web.desc: Next.js, edge runtimes, headless CMS, WebGL. Sites engineered for performance, animation and longevity.

three.title: 3D & Interactive
three.desc: Three.js, R3F, shaders, real-time rendering. Worlds you can walk into — engineered for the browser.

philosophy.quote:
Design is the last interface between intent
and outcome. We engineer it like infrastructure,
treat it like cinema.

steps.name: Listen, decode
steps.desc: Conversation, audit, sharp diagnostic. Before a single pixel moves, we know exactly what truth needs to be expressed.

steps.name: Direction & strategy
steps.desc: Positioning, narrative, principles and creative direction. The studio aligns on a single horizon before sprinting toward it.

steps.name: Design in motion
steps.desc: Identity systems, product surfaces and motion language built in parallel. Static frames die fast — we design with motion from iteration one.

steps.name: Engineer, ship
steps.desc: In-house engineering on Next.js, R3F and edge infrastructure. Designers and engineers side-by-side until build matches comp pixel-for-pixel.

steps.name: Operate, evolve
steps.desc: We stay in orbit. Quarterly design reviews, ongoing systems work and long-term partnership designed around compounding craft.

reach.label:
Monthly users touching
work we have shipped

items.q: KREA didn't just redesign our product — they rewrote the relationship our users have with money. Every screen feels like a deliberate sentence.
The level of craft is honestly unusual. They engineer their motion the way Pixar engineers a frame — with intent visible in every detail.
We've worked with the best studios in London and New York. KREA is in a quieter, sharper league of its own — closer to an atelier than an agency.

form.label: Start a project / 005
form.title:
Let's build something
unrepeatable.
form.lead: Tell us about your project. We respond within one business day.
